name: Consolidated Water Co. Ltd.
summary: Consolidated Water Co. Ltd. (CWCO) operates water production and distribution businesses, primarily utilizing desalination technology to supply potable water. The company serves government entities and other customers across multiple countries, including operations on Grand Cayman under a retail license. It conducts business in international markets, focusing on water utility services in areas where freshwater resources are limited.

products.name: Desalinated Water Supply
products.description: Production and distribution of potable water via desalination technology to retail and wholesale customers.

products.name: Retail Water Service
products.description: Retail water distribution on Grand Cayman under a government-issued retail license.

partnerships.description: Operates under agreements and licenses with government entities in countries where it conducts business.
